itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh City Arrival
itinerary.description:
Morning

Upon arrival at Tan Son Nhat Airport in Ho Chi Minh City, our driver and guide will take you to a luxury hotel for check-in. Usually, the time for check-in is 14:00, in case you require early check-in with an additional charge, please book with your travel consultant. The rest of the time is for your recharge after a long flight. If you are interested in exploring Ho Chi Minh by night, here are some highlight recommendations. Must See Cultural A O Show Saigon Ticket	            FROM US $35 /pax
Luxury Dinner Cruise on Saigon River	            FROM US $46 /pax

itinerary.title: Luxury Cu Chi Tunnel Half Day - Sumptuous Dinner Cruise
itinerary.description:
Morning

After breakfast, our guide will meet you at the hotel lobby and transfer by private car to Cu Chi Tunnels around 08:00. Arrive at the vital “secret shelter” to support the Vietnamese soldiers during the Vietnam War as living quarters, supply routes, and communication, we start discovering the tunnels with exciting activities. First, you will have an in-depth look at the history presented in the brief introductory ‘propaganda’ video to the Cu Chi area. Then, you go find the traps, the secret entrances, the bunkers, and underground hideouts in the jungle. The highlight of the day is the...

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh City - Mekong Delta - Learn Catching Fish By Hand
itinerary.description:
Distance & Est. time: Cycling 7 km

Morning

Breakfast is served at the hotel, and please check out after that. Our driver will pick you up and transfer you to the Mekong Delta. Upon arrival, get on a wooden boat and breathe fresh air in the countryside while observing the tranquility of river life. When finishing the boat trip, we cycle for 7 km along the narrow village paths and cross the fruit orchards and local cottage workshops until reach the local tropical fruit farmer

itinerary.title: Cai Rang Floating Market - Fly To Da Nang - Michelin Dinner in Hoi An
itinerary.description:
Morning

Around 06:00, you will start the day with a relaxing wooden boat ride to the Cai Rang floating market, one of the busiest trading spots in the Mekong Delta. This is a great chance to observe the daily life of local people on the water. You’ll also stop by a small noodle workshop and enjoy some fresh tropical fruits during the trip. After the visit, you will head back toward Ho Chi Minh City. A tasty lunch will be served at a Mekong rest stop before the tour comes to an end

itinerary.title: Local Farm In Tra Que Village
itinerary.description:
Morning 

Following your breakfast, gather with our guide in the lobby at 8:00 for a farming workday as locals at Tra Que Village. Start cycling through windy rice fields on the outskirts of Hoi An; we arrive at an organic farm and learn about farming skills you may not have known before. Take a walk to a local house to watch traditional white rice and rice pancakes making and create your food product in a cooking class with a host. Enjoy specialties in lunch and go back to Hoi An ancient town, after a busy and challenging day.

itinerary.title: Hoi An Street Food Tour
itinerary.description:
Fulfill your breakfast at the hotel, and you will have Hoi An discovery on your own when the dawn rises. Here are some suggestive optional tours that you should consider in your plan

Cam Thanh Coconut Village & Lantern Making Half Day	FROM US $35 /pax
Tra Que Village by Bike & Cooking Class Half Day	FROM US $42 /pax
Hoi An: Half-Day Walking City Tour‎	FROM US $34 /pax
My Son Sanctuary Half-Day Tour from Hoi An	FROM US $48 /pax

Evening 

18:00: Please gather with our guide at the hotel’s lobby, and we will set off on an exciting walking food tour that satisfies foodaholics. We will savor the ...

itinerary.title: Hoi An - Hue: Road Transfer - Royal Dining Experience in Hue
itinerary.description:
Morning 

Finish your breakfast and proceed with hotel check-out. 08:00: Transfer to Hue via the Cloudy Pass (Hai Van Pass) by shuttle bus or private car, enjoying scenic views along the way. Arrive ancient capital Hue Center to check in at the hotel. Evening

Step into the grandeur of Vietnam’s imperial past with a special royal dinner in Hue. Guests will be greeted with a glass of Minh Mang wine and dressed in traditional royal costumes from the Nguyen Dynasty era

itinerary.title: Thuy Bieu Eco Village
itinerary.description:
Morning 

A tranquil morning in Hue begins with breakfast at your hotel. 08:00 - 08:30: Our guide will meet you at the lobby, get on the dragon boat at Toa Kham Wharf, and embark on a cruise for Perfume River exploration. The first sight we drop by is Thien Mu Pagoda, the historic temple and symbol of Hue City. Here, you will contemplate attractive architecture and the poetic Perfume River flows across. Return to the vessel for the scenic cruise trip to Hue Ecolodge and Thuy Bieu Eco-village.In the next 2 hours, you will walk or cycle around the village

itinerary.title: Fly To Hanoi - Fine Dining At Restaurant
itinerary.description: Have breakfast and check out the hotel in Hue. You have free time until our driver picks you up and transfers you to Hue Airport for the flight to Hanoi. Upon arrival in Hanoi, drive to your hotel and you are free to explore the city at your own pace. After that, you will delight in a sophisticated fine dining experience at one of Hanoi’s top culinary destinations. Indulge in a carefully curated menu that showcases the best of Vietnamese cuisine with a modern twist, all crafted from premium local ingredients

itinerary.title: Hanoi City Sightseeing By Jeep
itinerary.description:
Morning

Recharge your energy with breakfast at the hotel. Today is a unique exploration in Hanoi capital by Jeep. The city tour may take place during these times, depending on availability. Morning Tour: 8:00-12:30 (Lunch included at the end)

Afternoon Tour: 12:30-17:00 (Lunch included at the beginning)

Sunset & Night Tour: 17:00- 21:30 (Dinner included at the end)

Pick up at your hotel and meet our guide and driver for a safety briefing. Today you will take part in an exciting Hanoi tour on Jeep

itinerary.title: Halong Bay - Overnight On A Luxury Cruise
itinerary.description:
Morning

Begin your unforgettable journey with a luxury limousine pick-up from your hotel in Hanoi Old Quarter. Relax during the scenic transfer to Tuan Chau Pier, Halong Bay. Upon arrival, head to your cruise for a smooth check-in to the cruise. Please enjoy a welcome drink and listen to safety instructions from the captain before receiving your opulent room. And a delightful lunch awaits you at the restaurant

itinerary.title: Halong Bay - Hanoi
itinerary.description:
Morning

06:00: Early risers can absorb the magnificent sunrise over the karst formations of Halong Bay and take some minutes of Tai Chi Class. After that, a light breakfast will be served enough to recharge to continue the excursion in Halong Bay, like releasing yourself and relaxing in the crystal clear water or inspecting more caves following each cruise's itinerary. Return to the cruise for a short break and boost your energy with a delicious brunch. Please process check out 10:00 - 10:30 while leisurely cruising through the beautiful rock formations towards the port. Warmly say goodbye to...

itinerary.title: Free Day In Hanoi
itinerary.description:
Today is your free day to rest in Hanoi or explore neighboring provinces. If you haven’t had any idea about your journey, do not hesitate to refer to one of our exciting recommendations below:

A Day in Ky Son: Biking, Cooking & Herbal Healing	FROM US $109 /pax
Authentic Hanoi Countryside: Manh Farm & Cooking Class Full Day	FROM US $93 /pax
Hanoi’s Timeless Heritage - Traditional Handicraft Village Full Day	FROM US $89 /pax
Hanoi Handicraft Village Discover Full Day	FROM US $68 /pax
Duong Lam Ancient Village Full Day	FROM US $78 /pax

itinerary.title: Hanoi Departure
itinerary.description:
Morning 

Enjoy the last meal in Hanoi; after that is your free time. Please check out before 12:00, and our driver will transfer you to the airport for your departure flight. This is the end of your luxury tour to explore Vietnam. Hope you have had a great time with BestPrice Travel in recent days, and see you on the next trips!

highlights: Blend in the antique culture and balmy atmosphere of Vietnam with engaging activities such as bare-hand catching fish, doing farming activities, and cooking classes.
Wander through the enchanting ancient town of Hoi An, a UNESCO World Heritage site.
Embark on a luxurious cruise through the breathtaking karst landscapes of Halong Bay.
Explore the city's rich history with visits to the Temple of Literature and Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum.
included: AC land transfer in Car/ Minivan included airport transfer in all destination.
Accommodation shared in Twin/Double room with daily breakfast except overnight at local home-stay.
2 domestic flights Ho Chi Minh - Da Nang; Hue - Hanoi
Meals as stated in the itinerary
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
